name: Monthly Electricity Cost Calculator
seo_description: Estimate your monthly electricity cost from appliance wattage, hours of use and price per kWh. Free calculator with instant daily and monthly totals.
example_label: Calculate monthly electricity consumption for a household.

range_hints.potencia_w: Potencia of the aparato in watts
range_hints.precio_kwh: Precio of the electricidad (varía per contrato and país)

result_context: Aparato of {power_w}W usado {horas_dia}h/day consume {consumption_diario_kwh} kWh/day, {consumption_mensual_kwh} kWh/month. Costo mensual: {costo_mensual}€.
formula_display: Consumo_diario = potencia_W × hours ÷ 1000; Costo = consumption × price × 30
steps: Calculate consumption mensual: 5 kWh × 30 days = 150 kWh/month
Compare with otros aparatos to Identify mayores consumidores
mistakes: Not Consider consumption in standby (puede ser 5-10% of the total)
Use power nominal in lugar of consumption real medido
Not Consider variation of price per hours punta/valle
description: Monthly electricity cost estimation based on consumption.
